prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a simplified stochastic model assuming log-normal distribution of returns. A modest annualized drift (expected return) of 5% is applied for the point estimate and incorporated into the confidence interval calculations over the 6-day period. An estimated annualized volatility of 25% for GILD, typical for a large-cap biotech stock, is used to derive daily volatility and define the width of the confidence intervals. These are statistical approximations and do not account for specific company news, market events, or real-time fundamental/technical analysis.
